content.text:
The device appears stuck on a dim lockscreen / always-on-display showing time "16:??". Multiple attempts to wake it (press_home, swipe up at various speeds and start positions, single/double tap clicks at center, ai_click, open_app) all return success but the device remains on `com.android.systemui` with no UI elements interactable. The VLM cannot find any text/icons in the dim screenshot. I cannot proceed with task execution.

{
  "success": false,
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "evidence_summary": "Device remained stuck on Always-On-Display lockscreen (com.android.systemui keyguard, time 16:?? visible dimly) throughout the session; press_home, multiple swipe-up gestures, taps, and open_app calls all reported success but the screen never advanced — Simple Calendar Pro never came to foreground, so the event was never created or deleted.",
  "screenshot_paths": ["dim AOD lockscreen with 16:?? clock; XML showed com.android.systemui:id/keyguard_root_view with no interactive content"],
  "failure_reason": "无法解锁设备/唤醒屏幕——设备始终停留在 com.android.systemui 锁屏(AOD)状态，press_home/swipe/click/open_app 均无法点亮并解锁屏幕，因此 Simple Calendar Pro 从未进入前台，事件未被创建也未被删除。"
}

result:
The device appears stuck on a dim lockscreen / always-on-display showing time "16:??". Multiple attempts to wake it (press_home, swipe up at various speeds and start positions, single/double tap clicks at center, ai_click, open_app) all return success but the device remains on `com.android.systemui` with no UI elements interactable. The VLM cannot find any text/icons in the dim screenshot. I cannot proceed with task execution.

{
  "success": false,
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "evidence_summary": "Device remained stuck on Always-On-Display lockscreen (com.android.systemui keyguard, time 16:?? visible dimly) throughout the session; press_home, multiple swipe-up gestures, taps, and open_app calls all reported success but the screen never advanced — Simple Calendar Pro never came to foreground, so the event was never created or deleted.",
  "screenshot_paths": ["dim AOD lockscreen with 16:?? clock; XML showed com.android.systemui:id/keyguard_root_view with no interactive content"],
  "failure_reason": "无法解锁设备/唤醒屏幕——设备始终停留在 com.android.systemui 锁屏(AOD)状态，press_home/swipe/click/open_app 均无法点亮并解锁屏幕，因此 Simple Calendar Pro 从未进入前台，事件未被创建也未被删除。"
}
